strategy: Hit with Storm (+10%); avoid Myth (40% resist). He is Shadow with 12600 health and no minions.
Your first attack makes him Aegis-protect a Bronze Armor absorb on himself. Throw a cheap hit or wand first to pop the armor, then land your blade-stacked real hit next round.
Do not lean on Shields. After his Natural Attack he Shatters your positive Wards, so heal through his hit instead.
Late joiners lose a pip to Steal Pips, so arrive on time.
Stack blades and a Feint, then burst him once the armor is gone.
cheatNotes: Joining late costs you a pip to his Steal Pips. Be in before combat starts.
Your first attack triggers an Aegis-protected Bronze Armor absorb on him, so the shot lands into an absorb and the shield resists one removal. Pop it with a throwaway hit, then land your real damage.
After he attacks he Shatters your positive Wards, so do not count on shields to block his hit. Heal through it instead.
